title: Figure 4 from: Zhu A-H, Song Z-K, Wang J-F, Guan H-W, Qu Z, Ma H-X (2024) Multi-gene phylogenetic and taxonomic contributions to Xylaria (Ascomycota) associated with fallen fruits from China. MycoKeys 106: 23-41. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.106.124944
author: Zhu, An-Hong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Xylaria liquidambaris (a from Col.10062607 b–m from FCATAS874) a, b stromata on fallen fruits c stromatal surface d, e section through stroma, showing perithecia f asci in Melzer's reagent g, l ascospore in water h ascospores with germ slit in India ink i, j ascal apical ring in Melzer's reagent k ascospores with germ slit in Melzer's reagent m asci in water. Scale bars: 1.5 cm (a, b); 100 µm (c, d, e); 20 µm (f); 10 µm (g–m).
